requirement_topic.en: Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment Conformity Declaration (NKRZI / UR mark)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电/电信终端设备符合性声明（NKRZI / UR标志）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電/電信終端設備符合性聲明（NKRZI / UR標誌）

summary.en: All radio equipment and telecom terminal equipment placed on the Ukrainian market requires a mandatory NKRZI conformity declaration and must bear the UkrSEPRO UR conformity mark under the Law of Ukraine on Electronic Communications (No. 1089-IX, 2020) and associated NKRZI regulations. The National Commission for the State Regulation of Electronic Communications, Radio Frequency Spectrum and Postal Services (NKRZI) is the competent authority for spectrum and equipment conformity. CE Declaration of Conformity alone is NOT accepted as a substitute for the NKRZI UR declaration. However, due to Ukraine's EU Association Agreement (in force since 2017), EN/ETSI-based test reports are accepted by NKRZI as technical evidence, creating a pathway analogous to the EU RED process; a separate NKRZI declaration and UR mark are still mandatory. CCC is not recognised. Ongoing conflict (Russia-Ukraine war) creates significant disruption to customs processing, supply chains, logistics, and banking — practical market access must be assessed independently.
summary.zh: 依据乌克兰《电子通信法》（第1089-IX号，2020年）及NKRZI相关法规，在乌克兰市场销售的所有无线电设备和电信终端设备须取得NKRZI强制符合性声明，并加贴UkrSEPRO UR符合性标志。国家电子通信、无线电频率频谱和邮政服务监管委员会（NKRZI）为频谱和设备符合性主管机构。CE符合性声明单独不能替代NKRZI UR声明。但由于乌克兰于2017年起生效的欧盟联系协定，NKRZI接受基于EN/ETSI的检测报告作为技术证明，与欧盟RED流程类似；单独的NKRZI声明及UR标志仍为强制要求。CCC认证不被认可。当前局势（俄乌战争）对海关处理、供应链、物流及银行业务造成重大干扰——实际市场准入须独立评估。
summary.zht: 依據烏克蘭《電子通訊法》（第1089-IX號，2020年）及NKRZI相關法規，在烏克蘭市場銷售的所有無線電設備和電信終端設備須取得NKRZI強制符合性聲明，並加貼UkrSEPRO UR符合性標誌。國家電子通訊、無線電頻率頻譜和郵政服務監管委員會（NKRZI）為頻譜和設備符合性主管機構。CE符合性聲明單獨不能替代NKRZI UR聲明。但由於烏克蘭於2017年起生效的歐盟聯繫協定，NKRZI接受基於EN/ETSI的測試報告作為技術證明，與歐盟RED流程類似；單獨的NKRZI聲明及UR標誌仍為強制要求。CCC認證不被認可。當前局勢（俄烏戰爭）對海關處理、供應鏈、物流及銀行業務造成重大干擾——實際市場准入須獨立評估。

standards_or_laws: Law of Ukraine on Electronic Communications No. 1089-IX (2020)
Law of Ukraine on Conformity Assessment No. 2406-III (as amended)
NKRZI Regulations on Conformity Assessment of Radio Equipment and Telecom Terminal Equipment
UkrSEPRO national conformity assessment system — UR mark
Ukraine-EU Association Agreement (in force 2017) — enables EN/ETSI test report acceptance
DSTU EN 300 328, DSTU EN 301 893, DSTU EN 301 489 series (EU-aligned radio and EMC standards)

summary.en: China requires SRRC radio type approval (MIIT) for all intentional radio transmitters and a separate MIIT Network Access License (NAL / 进网许可证) for telecom terminal equipment connected to public networks. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under CNCA applies to products in the mandatory CCC catalogue including some radio and electrical safety in-scope equipment. GB standards (GB 9254, GB 4943, YD/T series) form the technical basis.
summary.zh: 中国要求所有有意无线电发射设备取得工业和信息化部下属无线电管理局（SRRC）无线电型式核准，接入公共网络的电信终端设备须另行取得工业和信息化部进网许可证（NAL）。强制CCC认证（国家认证认可监督管理委员会）适用于强制目录内的产品，包括部分射频及电气安全范围内的设备。技术依据为GB标准（GB 9254、GB 4943、YD/T系列）。
summary.zht: 中國要求所有有意無線電發射設備取得工業和信息化部下屬無線電管理局（SRRC）無線電型式核准，接入公共網路的電信終端設備須另行取得工業和信息化部進網許可證（NAL）。強制CCC認證（國家認證認可監督管理委員會）適用於強制目錄內的產品，包括部分射頻及電氣安全範圍內的設備。技術依據為GB標準（GB 9254、GB 4943、YD/T系列）。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval — 无线电发射设备型号核准 (MIIT Order No. 14, 2019)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — 电信设备进网许可管理办法 (MIIT Order No. 2, 2017)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA) — GB 4943.1, GB/T 9254 scope
GB/T 9254.1-2021 (Information technology equipment — radio disturbance characteristics)

gap.en: A new NKRZI conformity declaration and UkrSEPRO UR mark are required for Ukraine. SRRC approval and CCC marks are not recognised. EN/ETSI test reports generated for EU CE marking can be reused as technical evidence in the NKRZI declaration process (EU Association Agreement pathway), reducing duplicative radio and EMC testing, but cannot substitute the NKRZI declaration itself. The MIIT NAL scope does not map to NKRZI's framework. Beyond regulatory gaps, practical market-access risks are elevated due to ongoing conflict: customs delays, restricted banking channels, disrupted logistics, and variable enforcement capacity at Ukrainian border points should be assessed with in-country partners before committing to export.
gap.zh: 乌克兰要求重新取得NKRZI符合性声明及UkrSEPRO UR标志，SRRC核准及CCC标志均不被认可。为欧盟CE标志而生成的EN/ETSI检测报告可作为NKRZI声明流程的技术证明（欧盟联系协定路径），减少重复的无线电和电磁兼容测试，但不能替代NKRZI声明本身。MIIT进网许可证范围与NKRZI框架不对应。除法规差距外，当前局势带来的实际市场准入风险较高：海关延误、银行渠道受限、物流中断及乌克兰口岸执法能力不稳定，出口前应与当地伙伴独立评估。
gap.zht: 烏克蘭要求重新取得NKRZI符合性聲明及UkrSEPRO UR標誌，SRRC核准及CCC標誌均不被認可。為歐盟CE標誌而生成的EN/ETSI測試報告可作為NKRZI聲明流程的技術證明（歐盟聯繫協定路徑），減少重複的無線電和電磁相容測試，但不能替代NKRZI聲明本身。MIIT進網許可證範圍與NKRZI框架不對應。除法規差距外，當前局勢帶來的實際市場准入風險較高：海關延誤、銀行渠道受限、物流中斷及烏克蘭口岸執法能力不穩定，出口前應與當地夥伴獨立評估。

source.publisher: NKRZI — National Commission for the State Regulation of Electronic Communications, Radio Frequency Spectrum and Postal Services (Ukraine)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A separate NKRZI conformity declaration and UkrSEPRO UR mark are mandatory for all radio and telecom terminal equipment placed on the Ukrainian market. CE DoC and CCC are not sufficient alone. EN/ETSI test data generated for EU/CE purposes may be reused as technical evidence under the EU Association Agreement pathway, but does not substitute the NKRZI declaration itself. Practical market access is significantly affected by ongoing conflict — verify current customs, logistics, and banking channels with qualified in-country partners before export.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在乌克兰市场销售的所有无线电和电信终端设备，强制要求另行取得NKRZI符合性声明及UkrSEPRO UR标志。CE符合性声明和CCC认证单独均不满足要求。为欧盟/CE目的生成的EN/ETSI测试数据可通过欧盟联系协定路径作为技术证明复用，但不能替代NKRZI声明本身。当前局势显著影响实际市场准入——出口前请与合格当地伙伴核实现行海关、物流及银行渠道情况。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在烏克蘭市場銷售的所有無線電和電信終端設備，強制要求另行取得NKRZI符合性聲明及UkrSEPRO UR標誌。CE符合性聲明和CCC認證單獨均不滿足要求。為歐盟/CE目的生成的EN/ETSI測試數據可通過歐盟聯繫協定路徑作為技術證明複用，但不能替代NKRZI聲明本身。當前局勢顯著影響實際市場准入——出口前請與合格當地夥伴核實現行海關、物流及銀行渠道情況。
